candidate_lesson: When internal regime is MOMENTUM but TradingView returns zero confirming signals, treat the 75% sizing multiplier as a hard ceiling AND require the 30-indicator conviction to exceed 55% before entry — internal-only MOMENTUM below that conviction is the weakest configuration in the confirmation stack.
testable_rule: if internal_regime == 'MOMENTUM' and tv_signal_count == 0 and consensus_conviction < 0.55: veto_entry() else if internal_regime == 'MOMENTUM' and tv_signal_count == 0: size *= 0.75
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
